SparSCit

  • API Reference
SparSCit
  • Graph Tools (sparscit.gr)
  • View page source

Graph Tools (sparscit.gr)

Tools for neighbor-graph construction, community detection, and label transfer. This submodule builds k-nearest-neighbor graphs, runs Leiden clustering, constructs community hierarchies, and provides kNN-based label transfer between datasets.

Neighbor Graphs

  • src.graph._neighbors.knn() — Build a k-nearest-neighbor graph

  • src.graph._neighbors.knn_impute() — Impute values using k-nearest neighbors

Community Detection

  • src.graph._community.leiden() — Leiden community detection

  • src.graph._community.community_hierarchy() — Build hierarchical community tree

Label Transfer

  • src.graph._transfer.train_on_obs() — Train kNN model on .obs values

  • src.graph._transfer.train_on_matrix() — Train kNN model on matrix data

  • src.graph._transfer.predict() — Predict labels using a trained kNN model
